UI_POS_NoActiveOps: No active operations. Tune to POSnet frequency to receive broadcasts.
UI_POS_OperationExpired: Operation expired — window of opportunity has closed.
UI_POS_GuideIntro: POSnet is a radio-driven procedural operations system. Intercept military broadcasts to receive field operations, then complete objectives to fulfil them.
UI_POS_GuideStep1: 1. Find a radio (any type) and a computer (desktop or portable).
UI_POS_GuideStep2: 2. Place a desktop computer near the radio (within 3 tiles), or carry a portable computer.
UI_POS_GuideStep3: 3. Turn the radio on and ensure it has power.
UI_POS_GuideStep4: 4. Right-click the radio and select 'Connect to POSnet'.
UI_POS_GuideNote: Operations are broadcast at regular intervals. Keep your terminal open to receive new missions.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_TradeRoute: Funding a trade route to the northern settlements.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_ScrapMetal: Bulk scrap metal acquisition from the industrial district.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_FuelRun: Fuel convoy to the refinery and back. High demand, good margins.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_MedicalSupply: Medical supply run to the hospital wing. Urgent need.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_FarmExpansion: Expanding the community farm plots. Seeds and tools needed.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_WaterPurification: Water purification system parts from the treatment plant.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_ToolSmithing: Setting up a tool-smithing operation. Anvil and forge needed.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_RadioParts: Sourcing radio components for the relay network expansion.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_Ammunition: Ammunition reloading supplies. Brass, primers, powder.
UI_POS_BBS_InvDesc_ShelterRepair: Shelter reinforcement materials. Lumber, nails, tarps.

Trait_POS_SystemsThinker_desc: Sees connections others miss. Cross-correlation unlocks earlier (SIGINT 4).
Trait_POS_Impatient_desc: Can't sit still. Terminal analysis takes 30% longer.
Trait_POS_DisorganisedThinker_desc: Struggles to focus. -25% SIGINT XP, +20% noise in analysis.
Trait_POS_SignalBlindness_desc: Cannot grasp complex signal patterns. SIGINT capped at Level 5.

UI_POS_Tutorial_Toast_SigintL9: SIGINT: Intel Operator tier reached! Maximum analysis output.

UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstConnection_Li: You have connected to the POSnet Bulletin Board System. This terminal is your gateway to field operations, market intelligence, and the underground economy.
Check the BBS for available operations — these are your primary source of income and reputation. Complete missions to unlock higher tiers.
Visit commercial areas (shops, warehouses, gas stations) and right-click to gather Market Intel. Raw notes can be processed later at a computer terminal.
Tip: Keep your radio tuned to the correct frequency and stay near a computer. Signal strength affects what you can access.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstOpCompleted_L: Congratulations on completing your first field operation! Your reputation with POSnet contacts is growing.
Gather Market Intel from commercial locations — right-click in shops, gas stations, and warehouses. Each note captures local price data.
Your SIGINT skill improves as you complete operations and gather intel. At Level 3, you will unlock Terminal Analysis — a powerful tool for processing raw data.
Tip: Diversify your activities between operations, deliveries, and intel gathering. Each contributes to your SIGINT progression.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_SigintL3_Line1: You have reached SIGINT Level 3 — Pattern Seeker. A new capability is now available: Terminal Analysis.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_SigintL3_Line2: Find a computer terminal and use Process Intelligence to convert raw market notes into refined intelligence fragments. Feed in multiple notes for better results.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_SigintL3_Line3: Look for data recorders and media (microcassettes, floppy disks) in the field. These passive devices capture ambient intelligence that supplements your notes.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_SigintL3_Line4: Tip: At SIGINT Level 6, cross-correlation becomes available — combining diverse sources produces high-confidence insights.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstCamera_Line1: You have produced your first compiled intelligence artifact at a camera workstation. These Tier III products are the backbone of advanced market analysis.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstCamera_Line2: Camera workstations offer three operations: Site Survey Compilation, Recorded Tape Review, and Market Bulletin Production. Each creates different artifact types.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstCamera_Line3: Market Bulletins grant bonus reputation and influence category prices when distributed. Look for satellite dishes to broadcast your compiled reports even further.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstCamera_Line4: Tip: Higher equipment condition and SIGINT skill improve artifact quality. Keep your gear maintained.
UI_POS_Tutorial_Popup_FirstSatellite_Lin: Your first satellite broadcast has been transmitted. This is the apex of the intelligence hierarchy — Tier IV market propagation.
Satellite broadcasts push compiled intelligence into the regional market, affecting prices and generating significant reputation. Stronger reports have greater impact.
Dishes require calibration and electricity. Power outages cause decalibration over time, so maintain your generators. A terminal within range receives enhancement bonuses.
Tip: The endgame loop is gather → process → compile → broadcast. Each cycle improves your standing and market influence.
UI_POS_Analysis_EmptyGuidance_Line3: - Data recorder captures from radio signals

UI_POS_DataReset_Warning: WARNING: This tool permanently erases all POSnet data.
UI_POS_DataReset_Desc: All market observations, operations, investments, watchlists,
UI_POS_DataReset_Desc2: discovered items, SIGINT progress, and world economy state will be lost.
UI_POS_DataReset_Note: This screen is only visible with debug logging enabled.
UI_POS_DataReset_ConfirmBody2: All POSnet world and player data will be permanently erased.
UI_POS_DataReset_ConfirmBody3: The terminal will return to the main menu after reset.
